backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (Curation, Swarm, Location, LawToken, InterpretationToken, collectibles, voting, etc.) and persistent state maps for a legal annotation/graph platform with access control and user approval.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that defines old and new actor state shapes and provides a `run` function that performs an identity migration (pass-through) of all five core node maps.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the `getGraphData` principal-filtered update feature to specific files, components, and test requirements with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing short summaries of all frontend source files, describing each component's purpose, recent changes, and key behaviors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the React frontend app, mounting the app at `#root` and loading `src/main.tsx` as a module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing authentication state, view switching across six view types (including collectibles), profile setup modal display, and overall layout with Header/Footer.
frontend/src/components/CreateNodeDialog: Dialog component for creating all node types (curation, swarm, location, interpretationToken) with ISO country code selection, custom attributes, and parent node selection using graph data.
Alert dialog component that allows admins to permanently reset all application data after typing a confirmation string, with loading state and post-reset page reload.
A modal dialog that displays a filterable and sortable flat list of graph nodes (curations, swarms, locations, law tokens, interpretation tokens) with badges showing node type, jurisdiction, shared law token status, and linked location counts.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: A simple footer component displaying a copyright notice with a heart icon and a link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: The app header with logo, theme toggle, navigation tabs (Graph, List, Terminal, Swarms, Buzz, Collectibles), login/logout via Internet Identity, and a create-node dialog, shown conditionally based on authentication state.
frontend/src/components/LandingGraphDiag: An animated canvas-based force-directed graph diagram for the landing page that fetches graph data from the backend (with 24-hour localStorage caching) and renders nodes with hover tooltips using a grey/gold color scheme.
frontend/src/components/MermaidDiagram.t: A component that dynamically loads Mermaid.js from CDN and renders a Mermaid diagram from a provided text string, handling loading states, render cancellation for stale renders, and error display.
frontend/src/components/NFTDetailModal.t: A modal dialog for viewing and minting collectible NFT editions of law or interpretation tokens, showing edition status (minted copies, owners, remaining slots) and a mint action that deducts BUZZ balance.
frontend/src/components/NFTGallery.tsx: Displays a grid of Law Token and Interpretation Token collectibles owned by the current user, with a green checkmark badge if the user has minted a copy, and opens a detail modal on click.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSettingsM: A dialog modal for editing the user's profile name, social URL, and NFT mint settings (number of copies), while also displaying their current BUZZ token balance.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A mandatory first-time setup dialog that prompts a new user to enter a username and creates their profile via the saveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/SchemaBuilderFil: A filter/sort modal for browsing InterpretationTokens, supporting filtering by tags, from-nodes, and to-nodes, with sortable results rendered as clickable token items.
frontend/src/components/SwarmMembershipA: Displays pending and approved swarm membership requests for a given swarm, allowing the owner to approve contributors via a mutation.
frontend/src/components/SwarmMembershipB: Renders a contextual button or badge for a swarm node: shows 'Creator' if the user owns it, 'Member' if already joined, or a 'Join' button to send a membership request.
frontend/src/components/SwarmMembershipM: Displays a card listing all swarms the current user has created or joined, with each swarm expandable via an accordion to show its contributors via SwarmMembershipApproval.
frontend/src/components/TerminalDisambig: Renders a keyboard-navigable list of disambiguated node candidates in a terminal-style UI, allowing the user to select and confirm a match via arrow keys, Enter, or Escape.
frontend/src/components/TerminalOntology: Displays ontology output in both Turtle (TTL) and Mermaid diagram formats with copy-to-clipboard buttons and error handling for diagram rendering failures.
frontend/src/components/VoronoiDiagram.t: Renders an interactive canvas-based Voronoi diagram of graph nodes colored by type, with a 24-hour localStorage cache for graph data and hover tooltips.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data (graph data, swarms, curations, tokens, etc.), including a utility to reconstruct a full GraphData object from flat OwnedGraphData.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and includes custom scrollbar and Voronoi diagram styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/BuzzLeaderboard.tsx: Page component that fetches and displays a ranked leaderboard of BUZZ scores, showing user profiles, principal IDs, and scaled score values in a table with rank icons.
frontend/src/pages/CollectiblesView.tsx: Simple page wrapper that renders the NFTGallery component for browsing and minting Law Token and Interpretation Token collectibles.
frontend/src/pages/DebugPanel.tsx: Admin debug page that displays raw graph data (curations, swarms, locations, law tokens, interpretation tokens) in tabbed scrollable views, with a data reset dialog for admin users.
frontend/src/pages/GraphView.tsx: Interactive canvas-based graph visualization page that renders nodes and edges with zoom/pan, spatial indexing for viewport culling, persistent layout caching, and node-type filtering controls.
frontend/src/pages/OntologiesView.tsx: Page that displays the core Hyvmind OWL/Turtle ontology and per-swarm ontologies in collapsible sections with download functionality.
frontend/src/pages/TerminalPage.tsx: A terminal-style UI page that accepts slash commands to create and query graph nodes (curations, swarms, locations, interpretation tokens), displaying results as typed messages with session persistence and disambiguation support.
frontend/src/pages/TreeView.tsx: A hierarchical tree view page that renders graph nodes (curations, swarms, locations, law tokens) with expand/collapse, badges, swarm membership controls, and node creation dialogs.
frontend/src/utils/coreOntology.ts: Defines shared Turtle/OWL ontology prefix declarations, class definitions, and property definitions for the hyvmind knowledge graph schema.
frontend/src/utils/ontologySanitize.ts: Provides utility functions to sanitize strings into valid Turtle local names and Mermaid node IDs, and to truncate labels for compact diagram display.
frontend/src/utils/terminalCommands.ts: Implements the execution logic for terminal create commands (curation, swarm, location, interpretation token) including field validation, jurisdiction code checking, and tag type parsing.
frontend/src/utils/terminalMessages.ts: Contains pure functions that format all terminal output strings, including help text, error messages, find results, filter results, and missing-argument errors.
frontend/src/utils/terminalNameResolutio: Resolves node name references (by name or ID) for terminal commands, returning resolved, ambiguous, not-found, or graph-not-loaded status. Determines valid node types per command/field and searches curations, swarms, locations, law tokens, and interpretation tokens case-insensitively.
frontend/src/utils/terminalOntologyMerma: Generates a compact Mermaid flowchart diagram showing a node's ontology context, including parent/child (hasChild) and interpretation (FromRelation/ToRelation) relationships. Limits children to 2 and outgoing interpretations to 1 for compactness.
frontend/src/utils/terminalOntologyTurtl: Generates RDF Turtle serialization for a given graph node, organized into Properties, Classes, and Relations sections with standard ontology prefixes. Supports all node types (Curation, Swarm, Location, LawToken, InterpretationToken) and handles typed tag annotations.
frontend/src/utils/terminalOutputFormatt: Parses terminal message text into structured LineToken objects with type and indentation metadata for visual hierarchy rendering. Also provides a helper to return emoji markers for success/error message types.
frontend/src/utils/terminalParser.ts: Parses terminal command strings (starting with '/') into a structured object with command name, key-value fields, and optional argument. Handles quoted values, repeated keys, and the special tokens={...} brace syntax.
frontend/src/utils/terminalSession.ts: Persists and restores terminal message history to/from localStorage with versioned session storage. Clears stale sessions on version mismatch and supports saving ontology data alongside messages.
frontend/src/utils/ttlToMermaid.ts: Parses TTL (Turtle RDF) text to extract node labels and relationships (hasChild, hasParent, FromRelation, ToRelation), then generates a Mermaid flowchart string. Also exports a backward-compatible wrapper that returns the diagram text or an error message.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar without a page reload.
frontend/src/utils/voronoiPalette.ts: Defines a fixed color palette (fill, stroke, seed) for the five Hyvmind node types (curation, swarm, location, lawToken, interpretationToken) and exports a helper to look up a node type's style with a gray fallback.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that sets up dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, accordion keyframe animations, and registers the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state for the Hyvmind Graph app, recording architectural notes, known issues, existing features, and pending action requests — primarily around filtering graph nodes by caller/principal in the Motoko backend and updating the React frontend queries accordingly.
